'''Gale''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] of a series of constituent [[Planet/Legends|planets]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the final decades of the [[New Sith Wars|wars]] with the [[new Sith]] Empire. During one of the clashes Jedi [[Kiel Charny]], Gale's forces were able to silence the gun turrets of the Sith army. Despite these successes, Lord Gale was struck down during the battle, perishing on the muddy world with so many of his brethren.<ref name="jvs" /> Along with all the monuments and statues built to commemorate the fallen, Gale and several other Jedi were memorialized by the Republic through the naming of a [[Gale (planet)|ninth]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] in honor of his sacrifice.<ref name="Kyle Katarn's Tale">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale5|text=Light and Dark: Kyle Katarn's Tale, Mission 5|int=Kyle Katarn's Tale}}</ref>
